title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TUBA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AT TWIN PEAKS, MUNICIPALITY OF TUBA, PROVINCE OF BENGUET TO THE TWIN PEAKS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 97 / 97 OG No. 9, 1361 (Feb. 26, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8840, August 22, 2000 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TUBA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AT TWIN PEAKS, MUNICIPALITY OF TUBA, PROVINCE OF BENGUET TO THE TWIN PEAKS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Tuba National High School at Twin Peaks in the Municipality of Tuba, Province of Benguet, is hereby changed to Twin Peaks National High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 14, 1999 and

June 8, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved:

August 22, 2000

(Sgd.) JOSEPH E.

ESTRADA

President of the Philippines
